requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — RED Art. 3.1(a) + EN IEC 62368-1 (Cyprus 230 V/50 Hz, Plug G / BS 1363)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — RED第3.1(a)条 + EN IEC 62368-1（塞浦路斯 230 V/50 Hz，G型插头 / BS 1363）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — RED第3.1(a)條 + EN IEC 62368-1（賽普勒斯 230 V/50 Hz，G型插頭 / BS 1363）

summary.en: Cyprus applies EU harmonised electrical safety standards without national derogation. Under RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.1(a), radio equipment must protect the health and safety of persons, domestic animals, and property. For Wi-Fi routers, IoT gateways, smart home devices, and Bluetooth accessories, the mandatory harmonised safety standard is EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021 (Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Part 1: Safety requirements). EN 60950-1 ceased to provide presumption of conformity on 20 December 2020 and is no longer acceptable. Cyprus uses 230 V/50 Hz mains supply. Critically, Cyprus uses plug type G (UK 3-pin BS 1363) — the same plug type as the United Kingdom and Ireland — retained from the British colonial period (Cyprus was a British Crown Colony until 1960). This makes Cyprus unique among EU member states in not using Schuko (type C/F); mains-powered devices intended for Cyprus must be verified for type G plug and socket compatibility and labelled accordingly. Products must be labelled with the supply voltage/frequency in Greek (and English, given co-official status) for consumer-facing products. OCECPR enforces RED Art. 3.1(a) for radio equipment.
summary.zh: 塞浦路斯适用欧盟协调电气安全标准，无国家豁免。依据RED 2014/53/EU第3.1(a)条，无线电设备须保护人员、家畜及财产的健康与安全。对于Wi-Fi路由器、物联网网关、智能家居设备和蓝牙配件，强制适用的协调安全标准为EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021（音视频、信息和通信技术设备——第1部分：安全要求）。EN 60950-1自2020年12月20日起不再提供推定符合性，已不可接受。塞浦路斯使用230 V/50 Hz市电供应。关键在于，塞浦路斯使用G型插头（英式三脚BS 1363）——与英国和爱尔兰相同——源自英国殖民时期（塞浦路斯于1960年前为英国王室殖民地）。这使塞浦路斯在欧盟成员国中独特地不使用Schuko（C/F型）；面向塞浦路斯市场的市电设备须核实G型插头和插座的兼容性并相应标注。消费品须以希腊语（及英语，鉴于英语共同官方地位）标注供电电压/频率。OCECPR执行无线电设备的RED第3.1(a)条。
summary.zht: 賽普勒斯適用歐盟協調電氣安全標準，無國家豁免。依據RED 2014/53/EU第3.1(a)條，無線電設備須保護人員、家畜及財產的健康與安全。對於Wi-Fi路由器、物聯網閘道器、智慧家居設備和藍牙配件，強制適用的協調安全標準為EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021（音視頻、信息和通訊技術設備——第1部分：安全要求）。EN 60950-1自2020年12月20日起不再提供推定符合性，已不可接受。賽普勒斯使用230 V/50 Hz市電供應。關鍵在於，賽普勒斯使用G型插頭（英式三腳BS 1363）——與英國和愛爾蘭相同——源自英國殖民時期（賽普勒斯於1960年前為英國王室殖民地）。這使賽普勒斯在歐盟成員國中獨特地不使用Schuko（C/F型）；面向賽普勒斯市場的市電設備須核實G型插頭和插座的相容性並相應標注。消費品須以希臘語（及英語，鑑於英語共同官方地位）標注供電電壓/頻率。OCECPR執行無線電設備的RED第3.1(a)條。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/53/EU (RED), Art. 3.1(a) — as transposed in Cyprus
EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment; Part 1: Safety requirements (harmonised under RED and LVD)
BS 1363 — UK standard for 13 A plugs, socket-outlets, and adaptors (type G; used in Cyprus)
Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD) — Low Voltage Directive; may apply to standalone mains-powered accessories

summary.en: In China, information technology equipment safety is governed by GB 4943.1-2022 (equivalent to IEC 62368-1:2018, second edition), mandatory under CCC (CNCA-C17-01) for IT equipment. Chinese mains supply is 220 V/50 Hz with plug types A and I (GB 2099 series); Chinese products are often designed for 100–240 V input, but the plug type will differ from Cyprus's type G (BS 1363) sockets. GB 4943.1-2022 aligns with IEC 62368-1 second edition, while EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021 is derived from the third edition with an EU-specific A11 amendment. Chinese CCC safety certificates do not satisfy RED Art. 3.1(a) conformity assessment in Cyprus. FCC certification from the USA is also not recognised in Cyprus or any EU country.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术设备安全由GB 4943.1-2022（等同于IEC 62368-1:2018第二版）管辖，对CCC认证（CNCA-C17-01）下的IT设备为强制要求。中国使用220 V/50 Hz市电，插头类型为A型和I型（GB 2099系列）；中国产品通常设计为100-240 V输入，但插头类型与塞浦路斯G型（BS 1363）插座不同。GB 4943.1-2022与IEC 62368-1第二版一致，而EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021源自带有欧盟特定A11修正案的第三版。中国CCC安全证书不满足塞浦路斯RED第3.1(a)条合格评定要求。美国FCC认证在塞浦路斯或任何欧盟国家同样不予认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，信息技術設備安全由GB 4943.1-2022（等同於IEC 62368-1:2018第二版）管轄，對CCC認證（CNCA-C17-01）下的IT設備為強制要求。中國使用220 V/50 Hz市電，插頭類型為A型和I型（GB 2099系列）；中國產品通常設計為100-240 V輸入，但插頭類型與賽普勒斯G型（BS 1363）插座不同。GB 4943.1-2022與IEC 62368-1第二版一致，而EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021源自帶有歐盟特定A11修正案的第三版。中國CCC安全證書不滿足賽普勒斯RED第3.1(a)條合格評定要求。美國FCC認證在賽普勒斯或任何歐盟國家同樣不予認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 — Information technology equipment; safety; Part 1: General requirements (equivalent to IEC 62368-1:2018 2nd edition) (SAMR/CNCA, mandatory under CCC)
GB 2099 series — Plugs and socket-outlets for household and similar use (Chinese plug types A/I)

gap.en: Five gaps apply for Chinese manufacturers exporting to Cyprus: (1) Edition gap — EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021 (3rd edition + EU amendment) vs. GB 4943.1-2022 (2nd edition); A11 introduces additional fire enclosure and earthing conductor requirements absent from the Chinese standard; (2) Supply voltage/plug compatibility — China 220 V/A/I plug vs. Cyprus 230 V/50 Hz/type G (BS 1363); Cyprus type G is a 3-pin UK-style plug entirely different from both the Chinese plug types and the Schuko C/F plugs used in most other EU countries; products and their power supplies must be tested and labelled for European supply parameters and equipped with or supplied for type G sockets; (3) Chinese CCC test reports are insufficient for RED Art. 3.1(a) — re-testing at an EU-recognised laboratory is required; (4) EN 60950-1 is no longer valid and must not be cited in the DoC; (5) FCC certification is not recognised in Cyprus. Manufacturers supplying both Cyprus and the UK may leverage the same BS 1363 plug hardware but must note that UK type approval (UKCA) and EU CE marking are separate regulatory regimes post-Brexit.
gap.zh: 中国制造商出口到塞浦路斯存在五项差距：（1）版本差距——EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021（第三版+欧盟修正案）与GB 4943.1-2022（第二版）；A11引入了中国标准中不存在的防火外壳和接地导体附加要求；（2）供电电压/插头兼容性——中国220 V/A/I型插头与塞浦路斯230 V/50 Hz/G型插头（BS 1363）不同；塞浦路斯G型插头是英式三脚插头，与中国插头类型以及大多数其他欧盟国家使用的Schuko C/F型插头完全不同；产品及其电源须经欧洲供电参数的测试和标注，并配备或适配G型插座；（3）中国CCC检测报告不足以满足RED第3.1(a)条，须在欧盟认可实验室重新检测；（4）EN 60950-1已不再有效，不得在合格声明中引用；（5）FCC认证在塞浦路斯不予认可。同时面向塞浦路斯和英国供货的制造商可复用BS 1363插头硬件，但须注意英国型式认证（UKCA）和欧盟CE标志在脱欧后为独立的监管体系。
gap.zht: 中國製造商出口到賽普勒斯存在五項差距：（1）版本差距——EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021（第三版+歐盟修正案）與GB 4943.1-2022（第二版）；A11引入了中國標準中不存在的防火外殼和接地導體附加要求；（2）供電電壓/插頭相容性——中國220 V/A/I型插頭與賽普勒斯230 V/50 Hz/G型插頭（BS 1363）不同；賽普勒斯G型插頭是英式三腳插頭，與中國插頭類型以及大多數其他歐盟國家使用的Schuko C/F型插頭完全不同；產品及其電源須經歐洲供電參數的測試和標注，並配備或適配G型插座；（3）中國CCC檢測報告不足以滿足RED第3.1(a)條，須在歐盟認可實驗室重新檢測；（4）EN 60950-1已不再有效，不得在合格聲明中引用；（5）FCC認證在賽普勒斯不予認可。同時面向賽普勒斯和英國供貨的製造商可複用BS 1363插頭硬件，但須注意英國型式認證（UKCA）和歐盟CE標誌在脫歐後為獨立的監管體系。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.1(a); EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021 is the harmonised standard; 230 V/50 Hz / type G (BS 1363) plug required for Cypriot mains-powered devices; OCECPR enforces
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CCC-listed IT equipment — GB 4943.1-2022 under CNCA-C17-01 (SAMR); 220 V/50 Hz / A/I plug (domestic market); FCC not recognised in Cyprus

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021 is mandatory for electrical safety under RED Art. 3.1(a) in Cyprus. EN 60950-1 is no longer valid. Chinese CCC tests to GB 4943.1-2022 (2nd edition) do not cover EU A11 requirements. Products must be verified for 230 V/50 Hz operation and type G (BS 1363) plug compatibility — Cyprus is the only EU member state using the UK-style 3-pin plug. Re-testing at an EU-recognised laboratory and Greek/English-language labelling of supply parameters are required for consumer products. FCC certification is not recognised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021是塞浦路斯RED第3.1(a)条电气安全强制要求。EN 60950-1已不再有效。中国CCC依据GB 4943.1-2022（第二版）的检测不涵盖欧盟A11要求。产品须核实230 V/50 Hz运行及G型插头（BS 1363）兼容性——塞浦路斯是欧盟成员国中唯一使用英式三脚插头的国家。须在欧盟认可实验室重新检测，消费品须以希腊语/英语标注供电参数。FCC认证不予认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021是賽普勒斯RED第3.1(a)條電氣安全強制要求。EN 60950-1已不再有效。中國CCC依據GB 4943.1-2022（第二版）的檢測不涵蓋歐盟A11要求。產品須核實230 V/50 Hz運行及G型插頭（BS 1363）相容性——賽普勒斯是歐盟成員國中唯一使用英式三腳插頭的國家。須在歐盟認可實驗室重新檢測，消費品須以希臘語/英語標注供電參數。FCC認證不予認可。
